Perfect! The `better-sqlite3` module has been successfully rebuilt for Electron's Node.js version (which is what Cursor uses).

**What was the problem:**
- VS Code/Cursor extensions run in Electron, not regular Node.js
- Regular `npm rebuild` uses your system's Node.js version
- Electron has its own bundled Node.js version (MODULE_VERSION 136)
- Native modules must match the Electron version

**What was fixed:**
The `electron-rebuild` command compiled `better-sqlite3` specifically for Electron's Node.js version, which matches what Cursor is using.

**Try the extension again now** - the sync should work correctly! You may need to reload the window (`Ctrl+Shift+P` → "Developer: Reload Window") for the changes to take effect.

  "contents": "# Fix Summary: NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mismatch Issue\r\n\r\n## Problem\r\n\r\nThe extension failed to load `better-sqlite3` with the error:\r\n```\r\nError: The module was compiled against a different Node.js version using\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 128. This version of Node.js requires\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Root Cause\r\n\r\n- Cursor uses **Electron 37-39** which requires **NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136**\r\n- The installed `better-sqlite3@11.10.0` only had prebuilt binaries up to Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n- The binary needed to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor\r\n\r\n## Solution\r\n\r\n### 1. Updated better-sqlite3 to Latest Version\r\n\r\n**Changed**: `package.json`\r\n```json\r\n\"dependencies\": {\r\n  \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.5.0\",  // was ^11.0.0\r\n  \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\nThe newer version (12.5.0) includes prebuilt binaries for Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136).\r\n\r\n### 2. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: `setup-sqlite.js`\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n```json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- `QUICK_START.md`: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- `README.md`: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- `INSTALL_NOTES.md`: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ `npm install` - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary\r\n✅ `npm run setup` - Manually runs setup script successfully\r\n✅ `npm run compile` - TypeScript compilation successful\r\n✅ Binary installed at: `node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node`\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   ```\r\n   - Installs dependencies including `better-sqlite3@12.5.0`\r\n   - `postinstall` script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   ```\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1. Check `.cursor-history/` folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run `npm run setup` anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ `package.json` - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ `QUICK_START.md` - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ `README.md` - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ `setup-sqlite.js` - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ `INSTALL_NOTES.md` - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ `FIX_SUMMARY.md` - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n",

  "contents": "# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running `npm install`, the `postinstall` script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: `npm install -g node-gyp`\r\n4. 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n   - 历史文件保存在: `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   ```\r\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\r\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n```\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .cursor-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n\r\n",

许可证\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 `better-sqlite3` 到最新版本：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\n+    - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\n+ \n+ 3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\n+    - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\n+    - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n+ \n+ 4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\n+    - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\n+    - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\n+ \n+ 5. **查看保存的历史**\n+    - 历史文件保存在: `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\n+    - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\n+ \n+ ### 方法 2: 打包安装\n+ \n+ 如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\n+ \n+ 1. **安装打包工具**\n+    ```bash\n+    npm install -g @vscode/vsce\n+    ```\n+ \n+ 2. **打包扩展**\n+    ```bash\n+    vsce package\n+    ```\n+    这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\n+ \n+ 3. **安装 VSIX**\n+    - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\n+    - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\n+ \n+ ## 🎯 功能特性\n+ \n+ ### 自动保存\n+ - ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\n+ - ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\n+ - ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\n+ \n+ ### Markdown 格式\n+ - ✅ 清晰的对话结构\n+ - ✅ 时间戳标记\n+ - ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\n+ - ✅ 工具调用结果展示\n+ \n+ ### 文件管理\n+ - ✅ 按时间戳命名\n+ - ✅ Git 友好格式\n+ - ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\n+ \n+ ## ⚙️ 配置选项\n+ \n+ 在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\n+ \n+ ```json\n+ {\n+   // 启用/禁用自动保存\n+   \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n+   \n+   // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\n+   \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\n+   \n+   // 使用 UTC 时区\n+   \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n+ }\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 🔧 命令\n+ \n+ ### Save Chat History Now\n+ - **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\n+ - **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\n+ - **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\n+ \n+ ## 📝 输出示例\n+ \n+ 保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\n+ \n+ ```markdown\n+ <!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n+ <!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\n+ \n+ # 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n+ \n+ _**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n+ \n+ 帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\n+ \n+ ---\n+ \n+ _**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n+ \n+ <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\n+ 让我分析一下需求...\n+ </details></think>\n+ \n+ ---\n+ \n+ 我来帮你实现这个插件...\n+ \n+ ---\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 🐛 故障排除\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 扩展未激活\n+ \n+ **原因**: 没有打开工作区\n+ \n+ **解决**: \n+ - 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\n+ - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 找不到数据库\n+ \n+ **原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\n+ \n+ **解决**: \n+ - 确保已安装 Cursor\n+ - 数据库位置:\n+   - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\n+   - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n+   - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\n+ \n+ **可能原因**:\n+ 1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\n+ 2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\n+ 3. 工作区未打开\n+ \n+ **解决**:\n+ 1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\n+ 3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n+ 4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\n+ \n+ ### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\n+ \n+ **原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\n+ \n+ **解决**: \n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n+ - 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\n+ - 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\n+ \n+ ## 📊 日志查看\n+ \n+ 1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\n+ 2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\n+ 3. 查看扩展的日志输出\n+ \n+ 典型日志:\n+ ```\n+ Cursor Chat History Extension activated\n+ Database watcher started\n+ Found 5 composers\n+ Saved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 🔄 更新代码后\n+ \n+ 如果修改了扩展代码：\n+ \n+ 1. **重新编译**:\n+    ```bash\n+    npm run compile\n+    ```\n+ \n+ 2. **重新加载扩展**:\n+    - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\n+    - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\n+ \n+ ## 🌟 高级用法\n+ \n+ ### 自定义输出目录\n+ \n+ 可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\n+ \n+ ```json\n+ {\n+   \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\n+ }\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ### 禁用自动保存\n+ \n+ 如果只想手动保存：\n+ \n+ ```json\n+ {\n+   \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\n+ }\n+ ```\n+ \n+ 然后通过命令手动触发保存。\n+ \n+ ### Git 集成\n+ \n+ 建议将历史文件加入 Git:\n+ \n+ ```bash\n+ # .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\n+ # 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\n+ \n+ git add .cursor-history/\n+ git commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 📚 技术细节\n+ \n+ ### 数据库读取\n+ - 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\n+ - WAL 模式确保并发访问\n+ - 自动重试机制\n+ \n+ ### 文件监听\n+ - 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\n+ - 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\n+ - 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\n+ \n+ ### 文件命名\n+ - UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\n+ - 标题自动清理特殊字符\n+ - 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\n+ \n+ ## 🎉 开始使用\n+ \n+ 现在你可以：\n+ \n+ 1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\n+ 2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\n+ 3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\n+ 4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\n+ \n+ 祝使用愉快！ 🚀\n+ \n+ ---\n+ \n+ # Quick Start Guide\n+ \n+ ## 快速开始指南\n+ \n+ ### 1. 安装依赖\n+ \n+ ```bash\n+ npm install\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ### 2. 编译项目\n+ \n+ ```bash\n+ npm run compile\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ### 3. 开发模式\n+ \n+ 在 VS Code 中按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式。\n+ \n+ ### 4. 测试扩展\n+ \n+ 1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\n+ 3. 检查工作区根目录的 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\n+ 4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\n+ \n+ ### 5. 手动触发保存\n+ \n+ - 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\n+ - 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\n+ \n+ ### 6. 配置扩展\n+ \n+ 在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\n+ \n+ ```json\n+ {\n+   \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n+   \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\n+   \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n+ }\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 项目结构\n+ \n+ ```\n+ llm_chat_history/\n+ ├── src/                            # 源代码目录\n+ │   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\n+ │   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\n+ │   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\n+ │   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\n+ │   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\n+ │   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\n+ │   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\n+ ├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\n+ ├── package.json                    # 项目配置\n+ ├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\n+ ├── README.md                       # 项目说明\n+ └── LICENSE                         # 许可证\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 故障排除\n+ \n+ ### 问题：扩展没有启动\n+ \n+ - 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\n+ - 检查数据库文件是否存在\n+ \n+ ### 问题：没有生成历史文件\n+ \n+ - 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\n+ - 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\n+ - 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n+ \n+ ### 问题：数据库锁定错误\n+ \n+ - 关闭 Cursor 后重试\n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n+ \n+ ### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\n+ \n+ **Windows 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\n+ \n+ **解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\n+ ```bash\n+ npm run setup\n+ ```\n+ \n+ 此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\n+ \n+ **解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\n+ \n+ 如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\n+ \n+ 1. 首先尝试更新 `better-sqlite3` 到最新版本：\n+ ```bash\n+ npm install better-sqlite3@latest\n+ npm run setup\n+ ```\n+ \n+ 2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\n+ ```bash\n+ cd node_modules/better-sqlite3\n+ # Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\n+ npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\n+ ```\n+ \n+ **解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\n+ \n+ 如果没有预编译二进制可用：\n+ 1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\n+ 2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\n+ 3. 运行：\n+ ```bash\n+ npm install -g node-gyp\n+ npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 打包发布\n+ \n+ 构建 VSIX 包:\n+ \n+ ```bash\n+ npm install -g @vscode/vsce\n+ vsce package\n+ ```\n+ \n+ 这将生成 `.vsix` 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\n+ \n+ ## 开发技巧\n+ \n+ 1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\n+ 2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\n+ 3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\n+ \n+ ## 下一步\n+ \n+ - 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\n+ - 添加导出功能\n+ - 集成更多配置选项\n+ - 优化性能和缓存策略\n+ \n+ ## 技术架构\n+ \n+ ```\n+ Cursor Database (SQLite)\n+          ↓\n+ DatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\n+          ↓\n+ DatabaseReader (读取数据)\n+          ↓\n+ ConversationBuilder (构建对话)\n+          ↓\n+ MarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\n+          ↓\n+ HistorySaver (保存文件)\n+ ```\n+ \n+ ## 相关资源\n+ \n+ - [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\n+ - [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\n+ - [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\n+ ",

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Combined Guide\r\n\r\n## Contents\r\n- FIX_SUMMARY.md\r\n- INSTALL_NOTES.md\r\n- INSTALL.md\r\n- QUICK_START.md\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Fix Summary: NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mismatch Issue\r\n\r\n## Problem\r\n\r\nThe extension failed to load `better-sqlite3` with the error:\r\n```\r\nError: The module was compiled against a different Node.js version using\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 128. This version of Node.js requires\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Root Cause\r\n\r\n- Cursor uses **Electron 37-39** which requires **NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136**\r\n- The installed `better-sqlite3@11.10.0` only had prebuilt binaries up to Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n- The binary needed to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor\r\n\r\n## Solution\r\n\r\n### 1. Updated better-sqlite3 to Latest Version\r\n\r\n**Changed**: `package.json`\r\n```json\r\n\"dependencies\": {\r\n  \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.5.0\",  // was ^11.0.0\r\n  \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\nThe newer version (12.5.0) includes prebuilt binaries for Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136).\r\n\r\n### 2. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: `setup-sqlite.js`\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n```json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- `QUICK_START.md`: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- `README.md`: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- `INSTALL_NOTES.md`: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ `npm install` - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary  \r\n✅ `npm run setup` - Manually runs setup script successfully  \r\n✅ `npm run compile` - TypeScript compilation successful  \r\n✅ Binary installed at: `node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node`\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   ```\r\n   - Installs dependencies including `better-sqlite3@12.5.0`\r\n   - `postinstall` script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   ```\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1. Press **F5** to launch the extension in development mode\r\n2. Open a workspace in the development window\r\n3. Have some conversations with Cursor AI\r\n4. Check `.cursor-history/` folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run `npm run setup` anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ `package.json` - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ `QUICK_START.md` - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ `README.md` - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ `setup-sqlite.js` - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ `INSTALL_NOTES.md` - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ `FIX_SUMMARY.md` - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running `npm install`, the `postinstall` script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: `npm install -g node-gyp`\r\n4. Run: `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n```bash\r\nxcode-select --install\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n```bash\r\nsudo apt-get install build-essential\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Version History\r\n\r\n- **2025-12-23**: Updated to better-sqlite3 v12.5.0 to support Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- Initial version used better-sqlite3 v11.0.0\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# 安装和使用指南\r\n\r\n## ✅ 安装完成！\r\n\r\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\r\n\r\n## 📖 使用方法\r\n\r\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\r\n\r\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\r\n   \r\n2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\r\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\r\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n   - 历史文件保存在: `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   ```\r\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\r\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n```\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .cursor-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Quick Start Guide\r\n\r\n## 快速开始指南\r\n\r\n### 1. 安装依赖\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 2. 编译项目\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run compile\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. 开发模式\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 中按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式。\r\n\r\n### 4. 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n```\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\r\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\r\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\r\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\r\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\r\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\r\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\r\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\r\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\r\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\r\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\r\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n\r\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n\r\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\r\n\r\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 `better-sqlite3` 到最新版本：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install better-sqlite3@latest\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\r\n```bash\r\ncd node_modules/better-sqlite3\r\n# Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\r\nnpx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\r\n```\r\n\r\n**解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n```\r\n\r\n这将生成 `.vsix` 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n```\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\r\n- [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\r\n- [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\r\n\r\n"

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 数据库读取器\r\n * 负责从 Cursor SQLite 数据库读取对话数据\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, DatabaseRow } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class CursorDatabaseReader {\r\n    private db: Database.Database;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\r\n        // 只读模式 + WAL 模式\r\n        this.db = new Database(dbPath, {\r\n            readonly: true,\r\n            fileMustExist: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 设置 WAL 模式\r\n        this.db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取所有 Composer\r\n     */\r\n    getAllComposers(): ComposerData[] {\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            SELECT key, value \r\n            FROM cursorDiskKV \r\n            WHERE key LIKE 'composerData:%'\r\n        `);\r\n        \r\n        const rows = stmt.all() as DatabaseRow[];\r\n        const composers: ComposerData[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const row of rows) {\r\n            try {\r\n                // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\r\n                const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string' \r\n                    ? row.value \r\n                    : row.value.toString('utf-8');\r\n                const data = JSON.parse(valueStr) as ComposerData;\r\n                composers.push(data);\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Failed to parse composer:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return composers;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取指定 Composer 的所有 Bubble\r\n     */\r\n    getComposerBubbles(composerId: string, bubbleIds: string[]): Bubble[] {\r\n        const bubbles: Bubble[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const bubbleId of bubbleIds) {\r\n            const key = `bubbleId:${composerId}:${bubbleId}`;\r\n            const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT value FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key = ?');\r\n            const row = stmt.get(key) as DatabaseRow | undefined;\r\n            \r\n            if (row && row.value) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\r\n                    const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string' \r\n                        ? row.value \r\n                        : row.value.toString('utf-8');\r\n                    const bubble = JSON.parse(valueStr) as Bubble;\r\n                    bubbles.push(bubble);\r\n                } catch (error) {\r\n                    console.error(`Failed to parse bubble ${bubbleId}:`, error);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return bubbles;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 关闭数据库连接\r\n     */\r\n    close(): void {\r\n        this.db.close();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 带重试的数据库打开函数\r\n */\r\nexport async function openDatabase(dbPath: string, maxRetries = 3): Promise<CursorDatabaseReader> {\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {\r\n        try {\r\n            return new CursorDatabaseReader(dbPath);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            if (i < maxRetries - 1) {\r\n                // 等待 500ms 后重试\r\n                await sleep(500);\r\n                continue;\r\n            }\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    throw new Error('Failed to open database after retries');\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {\r\n    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 3169,
  "totalLinesInFile": 112
}

  "contents": "/**\r\n * 数据库监听器\r\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './conversation-builder';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\r\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\r\n\r\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Database watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行同步\r\n     */\r\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n            \r\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\r\n            \r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n                \r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n                \r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder();\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\r\n                if (workspaceRoot) {\r\n                    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n                    const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.cursor-history');\r\n                    \r\n                    const saver = new HistorySaver(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n                    await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n   "contents": "/**\r\n * 历史记录保存器\r\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class HistorySaver {\r\n    private historyDir: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.cursor-history') {\r\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存对话到文件\r\n     */\r\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\r\n        \r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n        \r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return filepath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件名\r\n     */\r\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\r\n     */\r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        // 移除特殊字符\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查是否需要保存\r\n     */\r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\r\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\r\n        } catch {\r\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

  "contents": "/**\r\n * 对话数据重组器\r\n * 将 Composer 和 Bubble 数据转换为统一的消息格式\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, Message } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class ConversationBuilder {\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 Composer 构建完整对话\r\n     */\r\n    buildConversation(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        bubbles: Bubble[]\r\n    ): Message[] {\r\n        const messages: Message[] = [];\r\n        const bubbleMap = new Map<string, Bubble>();\r\n        \r\n        // 创建 bubble 映射\r\n        for (const bubble of bubbles) {\r\n            bubbleMap.set(bubble.bubbleId, bubble);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 按顺序处理\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const header of headers) {\r\n            const bubble = bubbleMap.get(header.bubbleId);\r\n            if (!bubble) continue;\r\n            \r\n            if (header.type === 1 && bubble.type === 1) {\r\n                // 用户消息\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'user',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode)\r\n                });\r\n            } else if (header.type === 2 && bubble.type === 2) {\r\n                // AI 响应\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'assistant',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    thinking: bubble.thinking?.text,\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode),\r\n                    toolResults: bubble.toolResults\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取模式名称\r\n     */\r\n    private getMode(unifiedMode?: number): string {\r\n        switch (unifiedMode) {\r\n            case 1: return 'Chat';\r\n            case 2: return 'Agent';\r\n            default: return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Markdown 生成器\r\n * 将消息数组转换为格式化的 Markdown 文档\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { ComposerData, Message } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class MarkdownGenerator {\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\r\n     */\r\n    generate(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        messages: Message[]\r\n    ): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        // 文件头\r\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        markdown += `# ${composer.name || 'Untitled'} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)})\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let previousSpeaker: string | null = null;\r\n        \r\n        for (const message of messages) {\r\n            // 如果发言者改变，添加发言者标记\r\n            if (message.type !== previousSpeaker) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateSpeakerHeader(message);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 思考过程（如果有）\r\n            if (message.thinking) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 消息内容\r\n            markdown += message.text;\r\n            markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            // 工具调用结果（如果有）\r\n            if (message.toolResults && message.toolResults.length > 0) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateToolResults(message.toolResults);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            markdown += '---\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            previousSpeaker = message.type;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件头\r\n     */\r\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        return `<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session ${composer.composerId} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)}) -->`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成发言者标记\r\n     */\r\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\r\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\r\n            return `_**User (${this.formatDate(message.timestamp)})**_`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            const parts = [];\r\n            if (message.modelName) {\r\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\r\n            }\r\n            if (message.mode) {\r\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\r\n            }\r\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\r\n            return `_**Agent${info}**_`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成思考过程\r\n     */\r\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\r\n        return `<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n\r\n${thinking}\r\n\r\n</details></think>`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成工具调用结果\r\n     */\r\n    private generateToolResults(toolResults: Array<{ name: string; result: any }>): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        for (const tool of toolResults) {\r\n            markdown += `<tool-use>\\n<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n            markdown += '```json\\n';\r\n            markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\r\n            markdown += '\\n```\\n';\r\n            markdown += `</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n`;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 格式化日期为 UTC\r\n     */\r\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

Make sure you are using Cursor IDE.'\r\n        );\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\r\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 启动监听\r\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath);\r\n    watcher.start();\r\n    \r\n    // 注册命令：手动保存\r\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\r\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\r\n        () => {\r\n            watcher.syncNow();\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Chat history saved');\r\n        }\r\n    );\r\n    \r\n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\r\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension ready');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展停用时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function deactivate() {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension deactivated');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\r\n */\r\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n    \r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Linux\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 数据库监听器\r\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './database-reader';\r\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './conversation-builder';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\r\nimport { HistorySaver } from './history-saver';\r\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './workspace-filter';\r\n\r\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\r\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Database watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行同步\r\n     */\r\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n            \r\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\r\n            \r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\r\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n                    composer,\r\n                    reader\r\n                );\r\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\r\n                    continue;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n                \r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n                \r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder();\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n                \r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator();\r\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\r\n                \r\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n            }\r\n        } finally {\r\n            reader.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 扩展主入口文件\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\r\nimport { DatabaseWatcher } from './database-watcher';\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展激活时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension activated');\r\n    \r\n    // 获取配置\r\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\r\n    \r\n    if (!autoSave) {\r\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 获取数据库路径\r\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\r\n    \r\n    // 检查数据库是否存在\r\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\r\n        console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\r\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\r\n            'Cursor database not found. Make sure you are using Cursor IDE.'\r\n        );\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\r\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\r\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\r\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\r\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 启动监听\r\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath, workspaceRoot);\r\n    watcher.start();\r\n    \r\n    // 注册命令：手动保存\r\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\r\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\r\n        () => {\r\n            watcher.syncNow();\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Chat history saved');\r\n        }\r\n    );\r\n    \r\n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\r\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension ready');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 扩展停用时调用\r\n */\r\nexport function deactivate() {\r\n    console.log('Cursor Chat History Extension deactivated');\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\r\n */\r\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n    \r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Linux\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * 历史记录保存器\r\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class HistorySaver {\r\n    private historyDir: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history') {\r\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存对话到文件\r\n     */\r\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\r\n        \r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n        \r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return filepath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件名\r\n     */\r\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\r\n     */\r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        // 移除特殊字符\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查是否需要保存\r\n     */\r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\r\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\r\n        } catch {\r\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n"

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Cursor Chat History\r\n\r\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files.\r\n\r\n## Features\r\n\r\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\r\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\r\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\r\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\r\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\r\n\r\n## Installation\r\n\r\n### From Source\r\n\r\n1. Clone this repository\r\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\r\n   - The postinstall script will automatically download the correct binaries for your system\r\n   - If you encounter issues, run `npm run setup` manually\r\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\r\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\r\n\r\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. See [INSTALL_NOTES.md](INSTALL_NOTES.md) for troubleshooting.\r\n\r\n### From VSIX\r\n\r\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\r\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\r\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\r\n4. Select the downloaded file\r\n\r\n## Usage\r\n\r\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Saving\r\n\r\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/` in your workspace root.\r\n\r\n### Manual Save\r\n\r\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\r\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\r\n2. Running the command: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n\r\n## Configuration\r\n\r\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Settings\r\n\r\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\r\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history`): Directory to save history files\r\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\r\n\r\n## Output Format\r\n\r\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\r\n\r\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\nUser's question here\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\nAI's thinking process (if available)\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\nAI's response here\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n### File Naming\r\n\r\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\r\n\r\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\r\n\r\n## Requirements\r\n\r\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\r\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\r\n\r\n## Database Location\r\n\r\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\r\n\r\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\r\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n## Known Issues\r\n\r\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\r\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\r\n- **Windows**: First-time installation may require Visual Studio Build Tools if prebuilt binaries are unavailable. See [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md#故障排除) for solutions.\r\n\r\n## Contributing\r\n\r\nContributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.\r\n\r\n## License\r\n\r\nMIT License - see LICENSE file for details\r\n\r\n## Support\r\n\r\nIf you encounter any issues, please file them in the GitHub repository.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\r\n\r\n\r\n"

Check `.llm-chat-history/` folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run `npm run setup` anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ `package.json` - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ `QUICK_START.md` - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ `README.md` - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ `setup-sqlite.js` - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ `INSTALL_NOTES.md` - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ `FIX_SUMMARY.md` - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running `npm install`, the `postinstall` script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: `npm install -g node-gyp`\r\n4. Run: `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n```bash\r\nxcode-select --install\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n```bash\r\nsudo apt-get install build-essential\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Version History\r\n\r\n- **2025-12-23**: Updated to better-sqlite3 v12.5.0 to support Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- Initial version used better-sqlite3 v11.0.0\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# 安装和使用指南\r\n\r\n## ✅ 安装完成！\r\n\r\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\r\n\r\n## 📖 使用方法\r\n\r\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\r\n\r\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\r\n   \r\n2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\r\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\r\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n- 历史文件保存在: `.llm-chat-history/` 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   ```\r\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\r\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n```\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .cursor-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Quick Start Guide\r\n\r\n## 快速开始指南\r\n\r\n### 1. 安装依赖\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 2. 编译项目\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run compile\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. 开发模式\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 中按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式。\r\n\r\n### 4. 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n```\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\r\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\r\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\r\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\r\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\r\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\r\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\r\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\r\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\r\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\r\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\r\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n\r\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n\r\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\r\n\r\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 `better-sqlite3` 到最新版本：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install better-sqlite3@latest\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\r\n```bash\r\ncd node_modules/better-sqlite3\r\n# Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\r\nnpx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\r\n```\r\n\r\n**解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n```\r\n\r\n这将生成 `.vsix` 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n```\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\r\n- [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\r\n- [Chokidar 文件监听](https://github.com/paulmillr/chokidar)\r\n\r\n"
}
