  "contentsAfterEdit": "# Combined Guide\r\n\r\n## Contents\r\n- FIX_SUMMARY.md\r\n- INSTALL_NOTES.md\r\n- INSTALL.md\r\n- QUICK_START.md\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Fix Summary: NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mismatch Issue\r\n\r\n## Problem\r\n\r\nThe extension failed to load `better-sqlite3` with the error:\r\n```\r\nError: The module was compiled against a different Node.js version using\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 128. This version of Node.js requires\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Root Cause\r\n\r\n- Cursor uses **Electron 37-39** which requires **NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136**\r\n- The installed `better-sqlite3@11.10.0` only had prebuilt binaries up to Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n- The binary needed to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor\r\n\r\n## Solution\r\n\r\n### 1. Updated better-sqlite3 to Latest Version\r\n\r\n**Changed**: `package.json`\r\n```json\r\n\"dependencies\": {\r\n  \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.5.0\",  // was ^11.0.0\r\n  \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\nThe newer version (12.5.0) includes prebuilt binaries for Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136).\r\n\r\n### 2. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: `setup-sqlite.js`\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n```json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- `QUICK_START.md`: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- `README.md`: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- `INSTALL_NOTES.md`: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ `npm install` - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary  \r\n✅ `npm run setup` - Manually runs setup script successfully  \r\n✅ `npm run compile` - TypeScript compilation successful  \r\n✅ Binary installed at: `node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node`\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   ```\r\n   - Installs dependencies including `better-sqlite3@12.5.0`\r\n   - `postinstall` script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   ```\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1. Press **F5** to launch the extension in development mode\r\n2. Open a workspace in the development window\r\n3. Have some conversations with Cursor AI\r\n4. Check `.llm-chat-history/` folder for saved Markdown files\r\n\r\n## Prevention for Future\r\n\r\n- The setup script tries multiple Electron versions automatically\r\n- If Cursor updates to a newer Electron version, the script will adapt\r\n- Documentation provides clear troubleshooting steps\r\n- Users can run `npm run setup` anytime to re-download binaries\r\n\r\n## Technical Details\r\n\r\n### Electron to NODE_MODULE_VERSION Mapping\r\n\r\n| Electron Version | NODE_MODULE_VERSION | Support Status |\r\n|-----------------|---------------------|----------------|\r\n| 39.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 37.x | 136 | ✅ Supported (better-sqlite3@12.5.0) |\r\n| 36.x | 135 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 33.x | 130 | ✅ Supported |\r\n| 32.x | 128 | ✅ Supported (older better-sqlite3) |\r\n\r\n### Files Modified\r\n\r\n- ✏️ `package.json` - Updated better-sqlite3 version and scripts\r\n- ✏️ `QUICK_START.md` - Added troubleshooting section\r\n- ✏️ `README.md` - Added installation notes\r\n- ➕ `setup-sqlite.js` - Created automated setup script\r\n- ➕ `INSTALL_NOTES.md` - Created technical documentation\r\n- ➕ `FIX_SUMMARY.md` - This file\r\n\r\n## Date\r\n\r\nFixed: December 23, 2025\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Installation Notes\r\n\r\n## About better-sqlite3 Setup\r\n\r\nThis extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native Node.js module that needs to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor/VSCode.\r\n\r\n### Automatic Setup\r\n\r\nAfter running `npm install`, the `postinstall` script automatically:\r\n1. Detects the Electron version\r\n2. Downloads the correct prebuilt binary for Electron\r\n3. Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) to ensure compatibility\r\n\r\n### Manual Setup\r\n\r\nIf automatic setup fails or you encounter errors like:\r\n- \"Could not locate the bindings file\"\r\n- \"was compiled against a different Node.js version using NODE_MODULE_VERSION XXX\"\r\n\r\nRun the setup script manually:\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Current Configuration\r\n\r\n- **better-sqlite3 version**: 12.5.0\r\n- **Target Electron versions**: 39.x, 37.x, 36.x, 33.x\r\n- **NODE_MODULE_VERSION**: 136 (Electron 37-39)\r\n\r\n### Why Multiple Electron Versions?\r\n\r\nDifferent releases of Cursor and VSCode use different Electron versions:\r\n- Cursor typically uses Electron 37-39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- VSCode versions vary by release\r\n\r\nOur setup script tries multiple versions to ensure compatibility across different environments.\r\n\r\n### Troubleshooting\r\n\r\nIf prebuilt binaries are not available for your Electron version, you need to build from source:\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n1. Install [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. Select \"Desktop development with C++\" workload\r\n3. Run: `npm install -g node-gyp`\r\n4. Run: `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n```bash\r\nxcode-select --install\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n```bash\r\nsudo apt-get install build-essential\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Version History\r\n\r\n- **2025-12-23**: Updated to better-sqlite3 v12.5.0 to support Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136)\r\n- Initial version used better-sqlite3 v11.0.0\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# 安装和使用指南\r\n\r\n## ✅ 安装完成！\r\n\r\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\r\n\r\n## 📖 使用方法\r\n\r\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\r\n\r\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\r\n   \r\n2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\r\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\r\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\r\n\r\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\r\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\r\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\r\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\r\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\r\n\r\n5. **查看保存的历史**\r\n- 历史文件保存在: `.llm-chat-history/` 文件夹\r\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\r\n\r\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\r\n\r\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\r\n\r\n1. **安装打包工具**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **打包扩展**\r\n   ```bash\r\n   vsce package\r\n   ```\r\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n3. **安装 VSIX**\r\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\r\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n```\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .llm-chat-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .llm-chat-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 开始使用\r\n\r\n现在你可以：\r\n\r\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\r\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\r\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\r\n4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\r\n\r\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n# Quick Start Guide\r\n\r\n## 快速开始指南\r\n\r\n### 1. 安装依赖\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 2. 编译项目\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run compile\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. 开发模式\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 中按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式。\r\n\r\n### 4. 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".cursor-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n```\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\r\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\r\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\r\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\r\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\r\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\r\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\r\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\r\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\r\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\r\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\r\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\r\n\r\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\r\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\r\n\r\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n- 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\r\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\r\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n\r\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n\r\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\r\n\r\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\r\n```bash\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\r\n\r\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\r\n\r\n如果遇到 \"was compiled against a different Node.js version\" 错误，表示 Cursor 使用的 Electron 版本与已安装的二进制不匹配。\r\n\r\n1. 首先尝试更新 `better-sqlite3` 到最新版本：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install better-sqlite3@latest\r\nnpm run setup\r\n```\r\n\r\n2. 如果仍然失败，手动下载对应 Electron 版本的二进制：\r\n```bash\r\ncd node_modules/better-sqlite3\r\n# Cursor 通常使用 Electron 37-39\r\nnpx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target 39.0.0\r\n```\r\n\r\n**解决方案 3**：从源码编译（需要 Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n```\r\n\r\n这将生成 `.vsix` 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n```\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\r\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\r\n\r\n## 🎯 功能特性\r\n\r\n### 自动保存\r\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\r\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\r\n\r\n### Markdown 格式\r\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\r\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\r\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\r\n\r\n### 文件管理\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\r\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\r\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\r\n\r\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \r\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \r\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔧 命令\r\n\r\n### Save Chat History Now\r\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\r\n- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\r\n\r\n## 📝 输出示例\r\n\r\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\r\n\r\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\r\n\r\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\r\n\r\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n让我分析一下需求...\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排除\r\n\r\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\r\n\r\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\r\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\r\n\r\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\r\n\r\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\r\n- 数据库位置:\r\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\r\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\r\n\r\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\r\n\r\n**可能原因**:\r\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\r\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\r\n3. 工作区未打开\r\n\r\n**解决**:\r\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\r\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\r\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\r\n\r\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\r\n\r\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\r\n\r\n**解决**: \r\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\r\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\r\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\r\n\r\n## 📊 日志查看\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\r\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\r\n\r\n典型日志:\r\n```\r\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\r\nDatabase watcher started\r\nFound 5 composers\r\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 🔄 更新代码后\r\n\r\n如果修改了扩展代码：\r\n\r\n1. **重新编译**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run compile\r\n   ```\r\n\r\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\r\n   - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\r\n   - 或运行命令 \"重新加载窗口\"\r\n\r\n## 🌟 高级用法\r\n\r\n### 自定义输出目录\r\n\r\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \"docs/ai-conversations\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 禁用自动保存\r\n\r\n如果只想手动保存：\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": false\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\r\n\r\n### Git 集成\r\n\r\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .llm-chat-history\r\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\r\n\r\ngit add .llm-chat-history/\r\ngit commit -m \"Add AI conversation history\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 📚 技术细节\r\n\r\n### 数据库读取\r\n- 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\r\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\r\n- 自动重试机制\r\n\r\n### 文件监听\r\n- 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\r\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\r\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\r\n\r\n### 文件命名\r\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\r\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\r\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\r\n\r\n## 🎉 测试扩展\r\n\r\n1. 在开发窗口中打开一个工作区（必须）\r\n2. 在 Cursor 中进行一些对话\r\n3. 检查工作区根目录的 `.llm-chat-history/` 文件夹\r\n4. 你会看到自动生成的 Markdown 文件\r\n\r\n### 5. 手动触发保存\r\n\r\n- 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\r\n- 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\r\n\r\n### 6. 配置扩展\r\n\r\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\r\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n```\r\nllm_chat_history/\r\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\r\n│ Visual Studio Build Tools）\r\n\r\n如果没有预编译二进制可用：\r\n1. 下载 [Visual Studio Build Tools](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/downloads/#build-tools-for-visual-studio-2022)\r\n2. 安装时选择 \"Desktop development with C++\" 工作负载\r\n3. 运行：\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g node-gyp\r\nnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 打包发布\r\n\r\n构建 VSIX 包:\r\n\r\n```bash\r\nnpm install -g @vscode/vsce\r\nvsce package\r\n```\r\n\r\n这将生成 `.vsix` 文件，可以手动安装或发布到市场。\r\n\r\n## 开发技巧\r\n\r\n1. **查看日志**: 在开发窗口中打开\"输出\"面板，选择\"扩展宿主\"\r\n2. **调试**: 在源代码中设置断点，使用 F5 启动调试\r\n3. **重新加载**: 修改代码后，在开发窗口中运行\"重新加载窗口\"命令\r\n\r\n## 下一步\r\n\r\n- 自定义 Markdown 输出格式\r\n- 添加导出功能\r\n- 集成更多配置选项\r\n- 优化性能和缓存策略\r\n\r\n## 技术架构\r\n\r\n```\r\nCursor Database (SQLite)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseWatcher (监听变化)\r\n         ↓\r\nDatabaseReader (读取数据)\r\n         ↓\r\nConversationBuilder (构建对话)\r\n         ↓\r\nMarkdownGenerator (生成 Markdown)\r\n         ↓\r\nHistorySaver (保存文件)\r\n```\r\n\r\n## 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [VS Code Extension API](https://code.visualstudio.com/api)\r\n- [Better SQLite3 文档](https://github.com/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3)\r\n- [Chokidar   "contentsAfterEdit": "# Cursor 聊天记录导出系统 - 完整实施方案\r\n\r\n> 基于对 Cursor SQLite 数据库的实际验证和分析\r\n> 文档版本: 1.0\r\n> 创建日期: 2025-12-23\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 📋 目录\r\n\r\n1. [项目概述](#项目概述)\r\n2. [数据源分析](#数据源分析)\r\n3. [核心数据结构](#核心数据结构)\r\n4. [实施步骤](#实施步骤)\r\n5. [代码实现示例](#代码实现示例)\r\n6. [Markdown 生成规则](#markdown-生成规则)\r\n7. [常见问题](#常见问题)\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 项目概述\r\n\r\n### 目标\r\n\r\n实现一个 VS Code/Cursor 扩展，自动捕获并保存用户与 AI 的对话历史为 Markdown 格式。\r\n\r\n### 核心功能\r\n\r\n- ✅ 自动监听 Cursor 对话数据库变化\r\n- ✅ 读取用户输入、AI 思考过程和 AI 响应\r\n- ✅ 转换为结构化的 Markdown 文件\r\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名，便于版本控制\r\n- ✅ 支持 Git 友好的格式\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 数据源分析\r\n\r\n### 1. 数据库位置\r\n\r\n**Windows:**\r\n```\r\nC:\\Users\\{用户名}\\AppData\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb\r\n```\r\n\r\n**macOS:**\r\n```\r\n~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb\r\n```\r\n\r\n**Linux:**\r\n```\r\n~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 2. 数据库结构\r\n\r\n```sql\r\n-- 主表\r\nCREATE TABLE cursorDiskKV (\r\n    key TEXT UNIQUE ON CONFLICT REPLACE,\r\n    value BLOB\r\n);\r\n\r\n-- 键值对存储模型\r\n-- 键格式示例:\r\n--   composerData:{composerId}\r\n--   bubbleId:{composerId}:{bubbleId}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. 关键表名\r\n\r\n**实际验证结果**：\r\n- ✅ 主表名：`cursorDiskKV` (不是 ItemTable)\r\n- ✅ 包含 composerData 和 bubbleId 数据\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 核心数据结构\r\n\r\n### Composer Data（对话容器）\r\n\r\n**键格式**：`composerData:{composerId}`\r\n\r\n**数据结构**：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface ComposerData {\r\n  _v: number;                               // 版本号 (通常为 3)\r\n  composerId: string;                       // 对话唯一 ID\r\n  name: string;                             // 对话标题\r\n  createdAt: string;                        // 创建时间 ISO 格式\r\n  lastUpdatedAt?: string;                   // 最后更新时间\r\n  \r\n  // 对话引用列表（关键！）\r\n  fullConversationHeadersOnly: Array<{\r\n    bubbleId: string;                       // Bubble ID\r\n    type: number;                           // 1=用户消息, 2=AI响应\r\n  }>;\r\n  \r\n  // 其他元数据\r\n  text: string;                             // 当前输入框文本\r\n  richText: string;                         // 富文本格式\r\n  modelConfig: {\r\n    modelName: string;                      // 使用的模型\r\n  };\r\n  unifiedMode: number;                      // 模式 (1=Chat, 2=Agent)\r\n  isAgentic: boolean;                       // 是否为 Agent 模式\r\n  \r\n  // ... 更多配置字段\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**关键字段**：\r\n- ✅ `fullConversationHeadersOnly`: 包含所有对话的 bubbleId 引用\r\n- ✅ `composerId`: 用于关联所有相关的 bubble 数据\r\n\r\n### Bubble Data（消息单元）\r\n\r\n**键格式**：`bubbleId:{composerId}:{bubbleId}`\r\n\r\n#### Type 1 - 用户消息\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface UserBubble {\r\n  _v: number;\r\n  type: 1;                                  // 固定为 1\r\n  bubbleId: string;\r\n  requestId: string;\r\n  createdAt: string;                        // ISO 时间戳\r\n  \r\n  // 💡 用户输入内容\r\n  text: string;                             // ⭐ 用户输入的纯文本\r\n  richText: string;                         // 富文本格式 (JSON)\r\n  \r\n  // 上下文信息\r\n  modelInfo: {\r\n    modelName: string;                      // 使用的模型\r\n  };\r\n  unifiedMode: number;                      // 模式\r\n  isAgentic: boolean;                       // 是否 Agent 模式\r\n  workspaceUris: string[];                  // 工作区路径\r\n  \r\n  // ... 其他字段\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**关键字段**：\r\n- ✅ `text`: **用户输入的实际内容**\r\n\r\n#### Type 2 - AI 响应\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface AIResponseBubble {\r\n  _v: number;\r\n  type: 2;                                  // 固定为 2\r\n  bubbleId: string;\r\n  requestId: string;                        // 关联到用户消息的 requestId\r\n  createdAt: string;                        // ISO 时间戳\r\n  \r\n  // 💡 AI 响应内容\r\n  text: string;                             // ⭐ AI 的实际响应文本\r\n  \r\n  // 💡 AI 思考过程（thinking models）\r\n  thinking?: {\r\n    text: string;                           // ⭐ AI 的思考过程\r\n    signature: string;                      // 签名\r\n  };\r\n  thinkingStyle?: number;                   // 思考风格\r\n  \r\n  // 时间信息\r\n  timingInfo: {\r\n    clientStartTime: number;\r\n    clientRpcSendTime: number;\r\n    clientSettleTime: number;\r\n    clientEndTime: number;\r\n  };\r\n  \r\n  // 模型信息\r\n  modelInfo: {\r\n    modelName: string;\r\n  };\r\n  \r\n  // 工具调用结果（如果有）\r\n  toolResults: Array<{\r\n    name: string;                           // 工具名称\r\n    result: any;                            // 工具结果\r\n  }>;\r\n  \r\n  // ... 其他字段\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**关键字段**：\r\n- ✅ `text`: **AI 的实际响应内容**（主回答）\r\n- ✅ `thinking.text`: **AI 的思考过程**（仅 thinking models）\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 实施步骤\r\n\r\n### 第 1 步：初始化扩展\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\n\r\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\r\n    console.log('Chat History Extension activated');\r\n    \r\n    // 获取数据库路径\r\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\r\n    \r\n    // 启动监听\r\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath);\r\n    watcher.start();\r\n    \r\n    context.subscriptions.push({\r\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n    \r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(\r\n            homeDir,\r\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 第 2 步：数据库读取器\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\n\r\nclass CursorDatabaseReader {\r\n    private db: Database.Database;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\r\n        // 只读模式 + WAL 模式\r\n        this.db = new Database(dbPath, {\r\n            readonly: true,\r\n            fileMustExist: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 设置 WAL 模式\r\n        this.db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取所有 Composer\r\n     */\r\n    getAllComposers(): ComposerData[] {\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            SELECT key, value \r\n            FROM cursorDiskKV \r\n            WHERE key LIKE 'composerData:%'\r\n        `);\r\n        \r\n        const rows = stmt.all();\r\n        const composers: ComposerData[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const row of rows) {\r\n            try {\r\n                const data = JSON.parse(row.value);\r\n                composers.push(data);\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Failed to parse composer:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return composers;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取指定 Composer 的所有 Bubble\r\n     */\r\n    getComposerBubbles(composerId: string, bubbleIds: string[]): Bubble[] {\r\n        const bubbles: Bubble[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const bubbleId of bubbleIds) {\r\n            const key = `bubbleId:${composerId}:${bubbleId}`;\r\n            const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT value FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key = ?');\r\n            const row = stmt.get(key);\r\n            \r\n            if (row && row.value) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    const bubble = JSON.parse(row.value);\r\n                    bubbles.push(bubble);\r\n                } catch (error) {\r\n                    console.error(`Failed to parse bubble ${bubbleId}:`, error);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return bubbles;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    close() {\r\n        this.db.close();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 第 3 步：对话数据重组\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface Message {\r\n    id: string;\r\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant';\r\n    text: string;\r\n    thinking?: string;\r\n    timestamp: string;\r\n    modelName?: string;\r\n    mode?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nclass ConversationBuilder {\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 Composer 构建完整对话\r\n     */\r\n    buildConversation(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        bubbles: Bubble[]\r\n    ): Message[] {\r\n        const messages: Message[] = [];\r\n        const bubbleMap = new Map<string, Bubble>();\r\n        \r\n        // 创建 bubble 映射\r\n        for (const bubble of bubbles) {\r\n            bubbleMap.set(bubble.bubbleId, bubble);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 按顺序处理\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const header of headers) {\r\n            const bubble = bubbleMap.get(header.bubbleId);\r\n            if (!bubble) continue;\r\n            \r\n            if (header.type === 1) {\r\n                // 用户消息\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'user',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode)\r\n                });\r\n            } else if (header.type === 2) {\r\n                // AI 响应\r\n                messages.push({\r\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\r\n                    type: 'assistant',\r\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\r\n                    thinking: bubble.thinking?.text,\r\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\r\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\r\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode)\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private getMode(unifiedMode?: number): string {\r\n        switch (unifiedMode) {\r\n            case 1: return 'Chat';\r\n            case 2: return 'Agent';\r\n            default: return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 第 4 步：Markdown 生成器\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nclass MarkdownGenerator {\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown 文档\r\n     */\r\n    generate(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        messages: Message[]\r\n    ): string {\r\n        let markdown = '';\r\n        \r\n        // 文件头\r\n        markdown += this.generateHeader(composer);\r\n        markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        markdown += `# ${composer.name || 'Untitled'} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)})\\n\\n`;\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let previousSpeaker: string | null = null;\r\n        \r\n        for (const message of messages) {\r\n            // 如果发言者改变，添加发言者标记\r\n            if (message.type !== previousSpeaker) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateSpeakerHeader(message);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 思考过程（如果有）\r\n            if (message.thinking) {\r\n                markdown += this.generateThinking(message.thinking);\r\n                markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 消息内容\r\n            markdown += message.text;\r\n            markdown += '\\n\\n---\\n\\n';\r\n            \r\n            previousSpeaker = message.type;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return markdown;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private generateHeader(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        return `<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session ${composer.composerId} (${this.formatDate(composer.createdAt)}) -->`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private generateSpeakerHeader(message: Message): string {\r\n        if (message.type === 'user') {\r\n            return `_**User (${this.formatDate(message.timestamp)})**_`;\r\n        } else {\r\n            const parts = [];\r\n            if (message.modelName) {\r\n                parts.push(`model ${message.modelName}`);\r\n            }\r\n            if (message.mode) {\r\n                parts.push(`mode ${message.mode}`);\r\n            }\r\n            const info = parts.length > 0 ? ` (${parts.join(', ')})` : '';\r\n            return `_**Agent${info}**_`;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private generateThinking(thinking: string): string {\r\n        return `<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\n${thinking}\r\n</details></think>`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private formatDate(isoDate: string): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(isoDate);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hour}:${minute}Z`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 第 5 步：文件保存器\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\n\r\nclass HistorySaver {\r\n    private historyDir: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存对话到文件\r\n     */\r\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\r\n        \r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n        \r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return filepath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        // 移除特殊字符\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\r\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\r\n        } catch {\r\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 第 6 步：监听器\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\n\r\nclass DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    start() {\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Database watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    stop() {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private scheduleSync() {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private async syncNow() {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            await this.performSync();\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    private async performSync() {\r\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n            \r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n                \r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n                \r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder();\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n                \r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator();\r\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\r\n                if (workspaceRoot) {\r\n                    const saver = new HistorySaver(workspaceRoot);\r\n                    await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        } finally {\r\n            reader.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Markdown 生成规则\r\n\r\n### 标准格式\r\n\r\n```markdown\r\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\r\n<!-- Cursor Session {composerId} ({timestamp}) -->\r\n\r\n# {对话标题} ({创建时间})\r\n\r\n_**User ({timestamp})**_\r\n\r\n用户的问题\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\r\n\r\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\r\nAI 的思考过程（如果有）\r\n</details></think>\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\nAI 的实际回答内容\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n_**User ({timestamp})**_\r\n\r\n用户的后续问题\r\n\r\n---\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 关键规则\r\n\r\n1. **时间戳格式**：`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MMZ` (UTC)\r\n2. **发言者标记**：\r\n   - 用户：`_**User (timestamp)**_`\r\n   - AI：`_**Agent (model xxx, mode xxx)**_`\r\n3. **思考过程**：使用 `<think><details>` 折叠\r\n4. **分隔符**：使用 `---` 分隔消息\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 代码实现示例\r\n\r\n### 完整的主函数\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// extension.ts\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\n\r\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\r\n    console.log('Chat History Extension activated');\r\n    \r\n    // 获取配置\r\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\r\n    \r\n    if (!autoSave) {\r\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 获取数据库路径\r\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\r\n    \r\n    // 检查数据库是否存在\r\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\r\n        console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 启动监听\r\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath);\r\n    watcher.start();\r\n    \r\n    // 注册命令：手动保存\r\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\r\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\r\n        async () => {\r\n            await watcher.syncNow();\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Chat history saved');\r\n        }\r\n    );\r\n    \r\n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\r\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function deactivate() {\r\n    console.log('Chat History Extension deactivated');\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### package.json 配置\r\n\r\n```json\r\n{\r\n  \"name\": \"cursor-chat-history\",\r\n  \"displayName\": \"Cursor Chat History\",\r\n  \"description\": \"Save Cursor AI chat history to markdown files\",\r\n  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\r\n  \"engines\": {\r\n    \"vscode\": \"^1.93.0\"\r\n  },\r\n  \"main\": \"./dist/extension.js\",\r\n  \"activationEvents\": [\r\n    \"onStartupFinished\"\r\n  ],\r\n  \"contributes\": {\r\n    \"configuration\": {\r\n      \"title\": \"Chat History\",\r\n      \"properties\": {\r\n        \"chatHistory.autoSave\": {\r\n          \"type\": \"boolean\",\r\n          \"default\": true,\r\n          \"description\": \"Automatically save chat history\"\r\n        },\r\n        \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": {\r\n          \"type\": \"string\",\r\n          \"default\": \".llm-chat-history\",\r\n          \"description\": \"Directory to save chat history files\"\r\n        },\r\n        \"chatHistory.useUTC\": {\r\n          \"type\": \"boolean\",\r\n          \"default\": true,\r\n          \"description\": \"Use UTC timezone for timestamps\"\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    \"commands\": [\r\n      {\r\n        \"command\": \"chatHistory.saveNow\",\r\n        \"title\": \"Save Chat History Now\"\r\n      }\r\n    ]\r\n  },\r\n  \"dependencies\": {\r\n    \"better-sqlite3\": \"^11.0.0\",\r\n    \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n  },\r\n  \"devDependencies\": {\r\n    \"@types/vscode\": \"^1.93.0\",\r\n    \"@types/node\": \"^20.0.0\",\r\n    \"typescript\": \"^5.0.0\"\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 项目匹配机制\r\n\r\n### 核心问题\r\n\r\n**如何区分当前项目的聊天记录，避免导出所有 Cursor 对话？**\r\n\r\n### 解决方案\r\n\r\n每个 Bubble 都包含工作区信息！通过路径匹配来过滤。\r\n\r\n#### 关键字段（已验证）\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// 每个 Bubble 都包含：\r\ninterface Bubble {\r\n    workspaceUris?: string[];          // ← URI 格式的工作区路径\r\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;      // ← 文件系统绝对路径\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 实际数据示例：\r\n{\r\n    \"workspaceUris\": [\"file:///d%3A/Projects/chat_history\"],\r\n    \"workspaceProjectDir\": \"c:\\\\Users\\\\85786\\\\.cursor\\\\projects\\\\d-Projects-chat-history\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n#### 实现代码\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nclass WorkspaceFilter {\r\n    private currentWorkspacePath: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor() {\r\n        // 获取当前 VS Code 工作区路径\r\n        const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;\r\n        if (workspaceFolders && workspaceFolders.length > 0) {\r\n            this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(\r\n                workspaceFolders[0].uri.fsPath\r\n            );\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查 Composer 是否属于当前工作区\r\n     */\r\n    async belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\r\n    ): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 获取第一个 bubble\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\r\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(\r\n            composer.composerId,\r\n            [firstBubbleId]\r\n        );\r\n        \r\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        const bubble = bubbles[0];\r\n        \r\n        // 方法 1: 使用 workspaceUris（推荐）\r\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\r\n            return this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 方法 2: 使用 workspaceProjectDir（备选）\r\n        if (bubble.workspaceProjectDir) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath(bubble.workspaceProjectDir);\r\n            return this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return false;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 将 file:// URI 转换为文件系统路径\r\n     */\r\n    private uriToPath(uri: string): string {\r\n        // file:///d%3A/Projects/chat_history → d:/Projects/chat_history\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 解码 URI\r\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\r\n            \r\n            // 移除 file:/// 前缀\r\n            let path = decoded.replace(/^file:\\/\\/\\//, '');\r\n            \r\n            // Windows: 处理盘符 (d%3A → d:)\r\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n                path = path.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return this.normalizePath(path);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Failed to parse URI:', uri, error);\r\n            return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 规范化路径（统一格式）\r\n     */\r\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\r\n        // 统一使用正斜杠\r\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n        \r\n        // Windows: 统一盘符大小写\r\n        if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n            normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 移除末尾的斜杠\r\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\r\n        \r\n        return normalized;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 比较两个路径是否匹配\r\n     */\r\n    private pathsMatch(path1: string, path2: string): boolean {\r\n        return this.normalizePath(path1) === this.normalizePath(path2);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n#### 集成到同步流程\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nasync function performSync() {\r\n    const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n    const filter = new WorkspaceFilter();  // ← 添加过滤器\r\n    \r\n    try {\r\n        // 获取所有 composer\r\n        const allComposers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n        console.log(`Found ${allComposers.length} total composers`);\r\n        \r\n        // 过滤属于当前工作区的 composer\r\n        const workspaceComposers: ComposerData[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const composer of allComposers) {\r\n            const belongs = await filter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(composer, reader);\r\n            if (belongs) {\r\n                workspaceComposers.push(composer);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        console.log(`Filtered to ${workspaceComposers.length} composers for current workspace`);\r\n        \r\n        // 处理过滤后的 composer\r\n        for (const composer of workspaceComposers) {\r\n            const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n            \r\n            if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n            \r\n            const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n            const builder = new ConversationBuilder();\r\n            const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n            \r\n            if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n            \r\n            const generator = new MarkdownGenerator();\r\n            const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n            \r\n            const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\r\n            if (workspaceRoot) {\r\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(workspaceRoot);\r\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    } finally {\r\n        reader.close();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n#### 关键点\r\n\r\n1. ✅ **每个 Bubble 都有工作区信息**：`workspaceUris` 或 `workspaceProjectDir`\r\n2. ✅ **URI 解码**：`file:///d%3A/...` → `d:/...`\r\n3. ✅ **路径规范化**：统一分隔符和大小写\r\n4. ✅ **只处理匹配的**：过滤后只保存当前工作区的对话\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 常见问题\r\n\r\n### Q1: 数据库被锁定怎么办？\r\n\r\n**A:** 使用只读模式 + 重试机制：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nfunction openDatabase(dbPath: string, maxRetries = 3): Database.Database {\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {\r\n        try {\r\n            return new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true });\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            if (i < maxRetries - 1) {\r\n                // 等待 500ms 后重试\r\n                await sleep(500);\r\n                continue;\r\n            }\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Q2: 如何处理工具调用（Tool Results）？\r\n\r\n**A:** Type 2 bubble 中的 `toolResults` 字段包含工具调用结果：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nif (bubble.toolResults && bubble.toolResults.length > 0) {\r\n    for (const tool of bubble.toolResults) {\r\n        markdown += `\\n<tool-use>\\n`;\r\n        markdown += `<details><summary>Tool: ${tool.name}</summary>\\n\\n`;\r\n        markdown += JSON.stringify(tool.result, null, 2);\r\n        markdown += `\\n</details>\\n</tool-use>\\n\\n`;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Q3: 如何区分 Chat 和 Agent 模式？\r\n\r\n**A:** 通过 `unifiedMode` 字段：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nfunction getMode(unifiedMode?: number): string {\r\n    switch (unifiedMode) {\r\n        case 1: return 'Chat';\r\n        case 2: return 'Agent';\r\n        default: return 'Unknown';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### Q4: 如何处理富文本（richText）？\r\n\r\n**A:** richText 是 Lexical 格式的 JSON，可以解析后提取纯文本：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nfunction extractTextFromRichText(richText: string): string {\r\n    try {\r\n        const data = JSON.parse(richText);\r\n        return extractTextFromLexical(data);\r\n    } catch {\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction extractTextFromLexical(node: any): string {\r\n    if (!node) return '';\r\n    \r\n    if (node.text) {\r\n        return node.text;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (node.children && Array.isArray(node.children)) {\r\n        return node.children.map(extractTextFromLexical).join('');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    return '';\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 性能优化建议\r\n\r\n### 1. 使用索引缓存\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nclass ComposerCache {\r\n    private cache = new Map<string, { hash: string; markdown: string }>();\r\n    \r\n    shouldUpdate(composerId: string, currentHash: string): boolean {\r\n        const cached = this.cache.get(composerId);\r\n        return !cached || cached.hash !== currentHash;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    update(composerId: string, hash: string, markdown: string) {\r\n        this.cache.set(composerId, { hash, markdown });\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 2. 批量处理\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nasync function batchProcess(composers: ComposerData[], batchSize = 10) {\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < composers.length; i += batchSize) {\r\n        const batch = composers.slice(i, i + batchSize);\r\n        await Promise.all(batch.map(c => processComposer(c)));\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. 防抖优化\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\nconst debouncedSync = debounce(syncNow, 2000, {\r\n    leading: false,\r\n    trailing: true,\r\n    maxWait: 5000\r\n});\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 部署检查清单\r\n\r\n- [ ] 数据库路径配置正确\r\n- [ ] 只读模式 + WAL 模式设置\r\n- [ ] 文件名生成规则（时间戳 + 标题）\r\n- [ ] Markdown 格式符合规范\r\n- [ ] 思考过程折叠显示\r\n- [ ] 工具调用结果处理\r\n- [ ] Git ignore 配置\r\n- [ ] 错误处理和日志\r\n- [ ] 性能优化（防抖、缓存）\r\n- [ ] 跨平台兼容性测试\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 总结\r\n\r\n### 关键数据位置\r\n\r\n| 内容 | 位置 | 说明 |\r\n|------|------|------|\r\n| **用户输入** | Type 1 bubble 的 `text` 字段 | 用户的问题或指令 |\r\n| **AI 思考** | Type 2 bubble 的 `thinking.text` 字段 | thinking models 的思考过程 |\r\n| **AI 响应** | Type 2 bubble 的 `text` 字段 | AI 的实际回答内容 |\r\n| **对话列表** | Composer 的 `fullConversationHeadersOnly` | bubble ID 和类型引用 |\r\n| **元数据** | Composer 和 Bubble 的其他字段 | 时间戳、模型名称、模式等 |\r\n\r\n### 实施路径\r\n\r\n```\r\n1. 读取数据库 (cursorDiskKV 表)\r\n   ↓\r\n2. 获取 Composer 数据 (composerData:{id})\r\n   ↓\r\n3. 提取 bubble ID 列表 (fullConversationHeadersOnly)\r\n   ↓\r\n4. 获取所有 Bubble 数据 (bubbleId:{composerId}:{bubbleId})\r\n   ↓\r\n5. 按类型分类处理：\r\n   - Type 1: 提取 text 字段 → 用户消息\r\n   - Type 2: 提取 text 和 thinking.text → AI 响应\r\n   ↓\r\n6. 按顺序组装消息\r\n   ↓\r\n7. 生成 Markdown\r\n   ↓\r\n8. 保存到文件系统\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 成功关键\r\n\r\n1. ✅ 使用正确的表名：`cursorDiskKV`（不是 ItemTable）\r\n2. ✅ 理解 Composer 和 Bubble 的关系\r\n3. ✅ 正确提取 Type 1 和 Type 2 的数据\r\n4. ✅ WAL 模式 + 只读访问保证稳定性\r\n5. ✅ 防抖和缓存优化性能\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n**文档版本**: 1.0  \r\n**最后更新**: 2025-12-23  \r\n**验证状态**: ✅ 已通过实际数据库验证\r\n\r\n本文档基于对 Cursor SQLite 数据库的实际查询和验证，所有数据结构和字段位置均已确认。\r\n\r\n\r\n"
}
